zh.Edworth, Bedfordshire, England: 英國英格蘭貝德福爾艾德沃斯
zh.Brynhill of Brindle, Chorley, Lancashir: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾霍利
zh.lifeSummary: Lady Sara Eppes是Sir Allen Eppes和Margaret Eps Ips的女兒，於1446年出生在英國肯特希廷波恩。她和Lawrence Garrad至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1512年在她的家鄉享年66歲。

zh-hans.Brynhill of Brindle, Chorley, Lancashir: 英国英格兰藍卡爾霍利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lady Sara Eppes是Sir Allen Eppes和Margaret Eps Ips的女儿，于1446年出生在英国肯特希廷波恩。她和Lawrence Garrad至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1512年在她的家乡享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Eppes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Epps
meanings: English: from Middle English (h)apse, (h)aspe ‘aspen tree, white poplar’ (Old English æpse, æspe). Generally, this was a topographic name for someone who lived by an aspen tree or a habitational name from a place called with this word, for example Apps in Surrey, Apse Manor on the Isle of Wight, or The Asps in Warwickshire.

English: perhaps from the Middle English personal name Eppe, a possible survival of Old English Eoppa, or its female counterpart Eoppe (Latinized in post-Conquest records as Eppa), probably from a stem eorp- ‘red’. Alternatively, Eppe may derive from Old Norse Øpi, perhaps from the stem øp- found in the verb øpa ‘to cry out, shriek’.
American shortened form of   Van Epps  , a surname of Dutch origin.

nameMeanings.name: Sara
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

variants.name: Sarah
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Lady Sara Eppes was born in 1446, in Sittingbourne, Kent, England as the daughter of Sir Allen Eppes and Margaret Eps Ips. She had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Lawrence Garrad. She died in 1512, in her hometown, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lady Sara Eppes est née en 1446, à Sittingbourne, Kent, Angleterre, fille de Sir Allen Eppes et Margaret Eps Ips. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Lawrence Garrad. Elle est décédée en 1512, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Lady Sara Eppes wurde 1446 in Sittingbourne, Kent, England, als Tochter von Sir Allen Eppes und Margaret Eps Ips geboren. Sie hatte mit Lawrence Garrad mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1512 im Alter von 66 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Lady Sara Eppes è nata il nel 1446 nel Sittingbourne, Kent, England come figlia di Sir Allen Eppes e Margaret Eps Ips. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Lawrence Garrad. Morì nel 1512, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.Sittingbourne, Kent, England: イギリスケントシッティングボウルン
ja.lifeSummary: Lady Sara Eppesは1446年にイギリスケントシッティングボウルンでSir Allen EppesとMargaret Eps Ipsの娘として生まれた。彼女はLawrence Garradとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1512年に故郷で66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Sara Eppes(은)는 1446년 영국 켄트 짓틴그보우른에서 Sir Allen Eppes(와)과 Margaret Eps Ips의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Lawrence Garrad(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1512년 그녀의 고향에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Lady Sara Eppes nasceu em 1446, em Sittingbourne, Kent, Inglaterra filha de Sir Allen Eppes e Margaret Eps Ips. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Lawrence Garrad. Ela faleceu em 1512, em sua cidade natal, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Lady Sara Eppes родилась в 1446 г. в местности ситтингбурн, кэнт, Англия. Её родителей звали Sir Allen Eppes и Margaret Eps Ips. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Lawrence Garrad. Она умерла в 1512 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Lady Sara Eppes nació en 1446, en Sittingbourne, Kent, Inglaterra como hija de Sir Allen Eppes y Margaret Eps Ips. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Lawrence Garrad. Murió en 1512, en su pueblo, a la edad de 66 años.
